name: io.github.qmediat/ideogram-mcp
description: MCP server for Ideogram V3 API — generate, edit, remix, reframe, replace background, upscale, and describe images. Security-first: zero axios, SSRF protection, Zod validation.

environmentVariables.description: Your Ideogram API key (get one at https://ideogram.ai/manage-api)
environmentVariables.name: IDEOGRAM_API_KEY
